name: Recette de Personnel (Staff Recipe)
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｒｅｃｅｔｔｅ ｄｅ Ｐｅｒｓｏｎｎｅｌ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ルセット・ド・ペルソネル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>～<ruby lang="jp"><rb>賄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まかな</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>いのレシピ～
desc: You can target 1 Ritual Monster you control; Special Summon 1 "Nouvelles Token" (Fiend/DARK/Level 1/ATK 50/DEF 50). This Token's Level becomes the same as that monster's. You can send this face-up card from your Spell & Trap Zone to the GY; Ritual Summon 1 "Nouvelles" Ritual Monster from your hand by Tributing monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels exactly equal the Level of that Ritual Monster. You can only use each effect of "Recette de Personnel (Staff Recipe)" once per turn.
eff: You can target 1 Ritual Monster you control; Special Summon 1 "Nouvelles Token" (Fiend/DARK/Level 1/ATK 50/DEF 50). This Token's Level becomes the same as that monster's. You can send this face-up card from your Spell & Trap Zone to the GY; Ritual Summon 1 "Nouvelles" Ritual Monster from your hand by Tributing monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels exactly equal the Level of that Ritual Monster. You can only use each effect of "Recette de Personnel (Staff Recipe)" once per turn.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
